system.description: Land mines are intended as an anti-personnel security measure. Distributing land mines throughout a zone will give that zone the Mined tag. Assuming no knowledge of the mines, anyone moving through a Mined zone must make a Prowess save to avoid stepping on a mine. Failure will result in a character triggering a mine. Land mines function like grenades and dynamite, dealing 12/W8. With knowledge or suspicion of the mines, characters can attempt to roll a Perception check to spot them. If successful, they can choose to disarm them with an Explosives check or make an Acrobatics check to navigate the zone.
